title: Goeppertia eximia

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, wounds, and gastrointestinal problems. The bioactive constituents of Goeppertia eximia include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
